title: Settings
subtitle: Helix control center
localNotice: Preferences on this screen are persisted locally by Helix.

general.title: General behavior
general.description: Language and window mode used on every new Helix launch.
general.defaultWindowModeHint: Window mode when opening the app.

model.description: Choose the provider and model. The key stays masked and technical options live in Advanced.
model.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter or paste your secret key

pet.description: Adjust the floating presence and window appearance.
pet.hidePetHint: The app keeps running in the background and reopens with {{shortcut}} or the menu bar.

privacy.notificationsHint: Off by default; notification content remains generic.

profiles.description: Agent profiles and prompt library for response styles and behaviors.

workflows.description: Automation templates, steps, and execution permissions.

skills.description: Custom agent skills with provider, model, and tool settings.

advanced.description: Timeout and endpoint for compatible providers.
advanced.timeoutError: Use a value between 5 and 600 seconds.
